notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the dbus SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 8.6. It addresses 4 CVEs: CVE-2022-42010, CVE-2022-42011, CVE-2022-42012, CVE-2023-34969.
notes.title: Description

references.summary: Canonical URL for this CSAF document
